JHIN-FLOURISH_POTION.title: Flourish Potion
JHIN-FLOURISH_POTION.description: This turn, your next [gold]Shoot[/gold] card triggers [gold]Flourish[/gold].
JHIN-FLOURISH_POTION.flavor: A single drop is enough to begin the finale early.
JHIN-RELOAD_POTION.title: Reload Potion
JHIN-LOTUS_POTION.title: Lotus Potion
JHIN-LOTUS_POTION.flavor: Every petal is a promise of pain.
JHIN-CURTAIN_CALL_POTION.title: Curtain Call Potion
JHIN-CURTAIN_CALL_POTION.flavor: The audience demands an encore... give them the finale.
